title: "La Vie: A Taste of the Mediterranean in Pompano Beach"
slug: "best-mediterranean-food-in-pompano-beach-la-vie-review"

seoDescription: "Experience authentic Mediterranean cuisine at La Vie in Pompano Beach. Our review highlights delicious dishes, a warm atmosphere, and why this restaurant is a must-try for food lovers. Discover your new favorite Mediterranean spot!"
---
<figure class="wp-block-table"><table class="has-fixed-layout"><tbody><tr><td><br /><img width="624" height="288" src="data:image/jpeg;base64,"><br />We had dinner at <a href="https://lavieflorida.com/?utm_source=localgrubber.com&utm_medium=newsletter&utm_campaign=la-vie-mediterranean-restaurant-in-pompano-beach&_bhlid=87f333a999419fd773ad723a97791b272e313913" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener"><em>La Vie Mediterranean Restaurant in Pompano Beach</em></a>. I was struck by the colorful interior. It was such a welcoming restaurant look and feel.<br />We ordered the hummus, chicken kebabs and chicken shawarma.<br /><img width="624" height="624" src="data:image/jpeg;base64,"><br /><img width="624" height="288" src="data:image/jpeg;base64,"><br /><img width="486" height="864" src="data:image/jpeg;base64,"><br />My only regret in ordering was that we did not have enough people for La Vie’s feast and platters. You needed 4 people and you could get such a great assortment of grilled meats, vegetables and shrimp. We had to settle for ordering our own dishes.<br />The hummus along with the laffa bread was my favorite part of the meal. The bread was so airy and tasty that I could have eaten it plain but add in the hummus and I was in heaven.<br />The chicken kebabs and the chicken shawarma were very tasty and grilled just the way I liked it. Unfortunately, there were no leftovers for us to enjoy the next day. We ate everything on our plates. My mother would be proud!!<br />I would definitely head back. I would try to be there on a Wednesday through Sunday when they have belly dancing. It just adds to the experience.<br /> </td></tr></tbody></table></figure>
